description:
SUBSCRIBE HERE https://www.youtube.com/@govclose/?sub_confirmation=1

Learn about the GovClose certification program  https://www.govclose.com

Hire a GovClose certified consultant to help your company: https://match.govclose.com/

Have you ever wondered if you could get paid for something you already enjoy doing?

In this video, I break down real examples of hobbies that the U.S. federal government is actively spending millions of dollars on every year. 

Most people think government contracting is only about defense systems, IT, or construction. The reality is very different. The federal government is the single largest buyer of goods and services in the world, and that includes areas most people would never expect.

We’re talking about government contracts tied to yoga instruction and wellness programs, ATV and off-road vehicle training, 3D printing and additive manufacturing, foreign language translation and interpretation, and even professional dog training services. 

These are not edge cases. These are recurring federal spending categories that create real opportunities for small businesses, consultants, and professionals who understand how federal procurement works.

Watch next:
1. Three habits that win government contracts : https://youtu.be/ZchZIaZ6ggo

2. Shark Tank to CEO: How Greg helps companies sell to the government with his consulting business. https://youtu.be/oIdPtgCq4PY

3. UFC fighter starts defense contracting business: https://youtu.be/qDS23FkDXOE

08:25 How Much the Government Spends on These Hobbies Each Year
